## Expected Content
- Left panel: Scatter plot of MIA AUC scores for 10 genuine + 10 fake unlearned models
- Right panel: Confusion matrix (2x2: Genuine/Fake vs PASS/FAIL)

|---|---|
| True Positive Rate | 100.0% |
| True Negative Rate | 90.0% |
